systemStatus.headline: Thu Jul 2 ~7 AM run: Google Ads + Yelp Ads refreshed LIVE via Chrome. GMAIL SEARCH ENDPOINT DOWN -- Toast/Sling/TripAdvisor/reviews email checks skipped, those values carried from the 4 AM run. GOOGLE ADS (Jul 1): cost $43.40, 8,550 impr, 173 clicks, CTR 2.02%, Avg CPC $0.25, 0 conversions (calculating). 7d (Jun 25-Jul 1): 60,986 impr / $379.97 / 254.30 conv (-28.93%) / 1,295 clicks. YELP (30d): 34.4k ad impr (77%), 428 ad clicks, 535 ad page visits (59%), 122 ad leads (68%); new billing period Jul 1 = $10.58 spend / $0.96 CPC. SECURITY (still open): Google Ads 'unauthorized activity' banner + new billing user (~May 30) -- verify; 1 GBP management request pending. REVIEWS: Patrick Williams 5* (Jun 25) still unanswered (carried).

GOOGLE ADS: account 'unauthorized activity' banner + new billing user (~May 30) -- verify login/billing access.

toast.source: 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara - 229 West Montecito Street - Tuesday, June 30' Daily Performance Summary (delivered Jul 1 2:40 PM, parsed from HTML at Jul 2 4 AM run).
toast.note: [CARRIED -- Gmail search down at 7 AM run] Tue Jun 30 Daily Performance Summary now delivered & parsed. Net $7,395.45 / Gross $7,670.65 / Discounts $275.20 (3.6%) / Refunds $0 / Voids 0. vs SDLW (Tue Jun 23): Net +44.3% ($5,124.30), Gross +46.6% ($5,231.20). vs 4-wk avg: Net +51.2%, Gross +50.3%. Net/order $28.34 -> ~261 orders (derived). Guest count and Labor% not cleanly extractable from this email's HTML. Wed Jul 1 summary arrives ~2:40 PM today.

disapprovals.detail: Previously Disapproved (Destination not working HTTP 404 iOS + Copyrighted content, Jun 9). As of the Sat Jun 27 live scrape this campaign is fully 'Eligible' (no longer Limited) and served Jun 26 (913 impr, 38 clicks, $26.72). Appears fully recovered; confirm destination URL fix held.

yelpAds.note: Thu Jul 2 ~7 AM LIVE Chrome scrape. Last 30d: 34.4k ad impr (77% of 44.5k), 428 ad clicks, 535 ad page visits (59% of 912), 122 ad leads (68% of 180). New billing period Jul 1 = $10.58 spend / $0.96 CPC so far. 12mo: Ads 1,024 leads (61%) / Organic 663 (39%) / Total 1,687; forecast 181; 12mo ad page visits 8.2k. Leads breakdown: Directions/Map 727, Calls 112, Website 824, CTA 24. Bonus budget remaining not shown on dashboard.
